summary: First-finish smoke pass for Chess Lifestyle CRM. Backend auth (admin/staff/student), students, leads, alerts, chat endpoints all healthy and returning seeded data. Frontend admin login flows through dashboard (alerts + 4 stat cards + 6 funnel stages), Students list (6 rows), StudentDetail with mark-present control, Leads list (7 rows) with working filter (New -> 1 lead), Payments page, and AI Chatbot which returned a live list of 4 unpaid students (Diya Kapoor, Kabir Reddy, Aanya Iyer, Vihaan Singh) using gemini-2.5-flash. Logout clears tcl_token and redirects to /login. Student login (aarav@student.com) is correctly redirected to /portal and attempting to navigate to /leads is redirected back to /portal (role-based route guard works).
passed: POST /api/auth/login for admin, staff, student all return token + user with correct role
GET /api/students returns 6 students; GET /api/leads returns 7 leads; GET /api/alerts returns 11 alerts
POST /api/chat (admin) returns live seeded reply naming unpaid students
Admin login stores tcl_token in localStorage and redirects to dashboard (root '/')
Dashboard renders alerts-section, stat-students/leads/revenue/unpaid, and all 6 funnel-<stage> tiles
Students page shows 6 rows; StudentDetail shows mark-present control
Leads page shows 7 rows; filter-new correctly narrows list to 1 lead
Chatbot UI: sending 'Who has not paid fees this month?' returns response containing Kapoor/Iyer/Reddy/Vihaan
logout-btn clears tcl_token and returns to /login
Student login redirects to /portal; direct navigation to /leads is blocked and redirects back to /portal
notes: Nav labels in UI are 'Fees' and 'AI' but data-testid nav-payments and nav-chat are intact and functional. Login redirects to '/' rather than '/dashboard' (dashboard is mounted on root), which is a routing spec nuance, not a bug. Did not exhaustively test add-student/add-lead dialogs, mark-paid mutation, or call-log creation in this latency-sensitive pass — recommend full testing pass to cover those write flows.
